message:
fix(ir): complete RegExpLiteral and HostCall match arm coverage

Add missing match arms for Expression::RegExpLiteral in parser_arena.rs
and static_semantics.rs, and add Ir1Op::HostCall variant with lowering
support to unblock RegExp literal compilation.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
